about.heading: About Me
about.bio: As a 4th-year Computer Engineering student, I am a research-oriented developer who has built end-to-end projects in artificial intelligence, machine learning, and software development. With hands-on experience across a wide technology stack including Python, TensorFlow, Keras, SQL, Java, Node.js, and React Native, I have turned advanced AI approaches such as federated learning, RAG architecture, and deep learning-based recommendation systems into real products. My research project was supported under TÜBİTAK's 2209-A program and published at an international conference.

items.title: Federated Learning Model Training
items.description: A privacy-preserving decentralized AI training system where user data stays on the client side and only model weights are sent to the server. Supported by TÜBİTAK 2209-A and published as an international paper at UAKK.

items.title: AI-Based Movie Recommendation System
items.description: A system that provides personalized movie recommendations based on users' past ratings. Powered by a TensorFlow-based collaborative filtering engine trained on user-movie interaction data.

items.title: TarihBot
items.description: A RAG-based AI chatbot that answers questions about the Republic of Turkey from 1923 onwards. Built on a custom dataset from Wikipedia and features a user-friendly Streamlit web interface.

items.title: Listify
items.description: A multilingual shopping list app for iOS and Android. Features local storage with AsyncStorage, list sharing via 6-digit code through REST API, category sorting, dark mode, and fuzzy search with Fuse.js.

publications.heading: Publications
publications.paper_title: Model Training and Real World Analysis Using Health Data with Federated Learning
